premarket_brief:
**PRE-MARKET GAME PLAN | 2026-06-05**

**Market Tone:** Flat open into NFP event with elevated VIX (20.0) and bear regime signals caution. Expect volatility spike post-data; 50% breadth warns of weak participation. Treat this as a range day until NFP clarity.

**Positions to Watch:** AXON (+10.3%) and GENI (+8.3%) are extended—monitor for profit-taking reversals. DKNG/TMHC flat; hold unless clear breakdowns. Use strength to trim winners if gaps widen.

**Top Entry:** AMKR/APGE (sc150)—
daily_debrief: Today's bull regime turned choppy with VIX spiking to 20.0 and only 50% breadth advancing despite market strength, signaling weakening conviction. PRAX scalps hit stops repeatedly (-0.1% each), while ARM's +4.0% outperformance masked deeper damage: ASYS cratered -7.0% and AMKR dropped -3.0%, leaving the portfolio -10.16%. Tomorrow, cut losses in ASYS immediately and reduce position sizing until breadth stabilizes above 60%.
